_comment: Canonical JSON mirror of the Anvil figure palette. The Python module anvil/lib/figures/palette.py is the source of truth; this file exists so figure scripts run with bare python3 (no PYTHONPATH) can json.load(...) the palette without importing anvil. Drift between this file and palette.py is enforced by tests/lib/test_figures.py::test_palette_json_matches_palette_py.
